intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/2. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 20:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/2. 20:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 20:00 at 100%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 20:00 at 100%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 20:00 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
